title: Venue | NUS Cultural Activities Club (CAC)
content: this website is under development. check in again on 1 august 2026. nus cac home venue funding publicity resources student groups equipment loaning about nus cac home venue funding publicity resources student groups equipment loaning about arts venue booking find the right space to bring your ideas to life. book venues now yusof ishak house university town university cultural centre (ucc) a glance of nus venues for the arts locations marked using coloured pins. click to view directions. book venues for arts events venues in yusof ishak house (yih) can be booked using the nus resource booking system (rebok) . reboks user guide venues in nus overview other venues available may require direct contact with venue owner. check the "venues in nus overview" user guide for more details. reach us info.nuscac@gmail.com where we are nus students' cultural activities club yusof ishak house 31 lower kent ridge road nus cultural activities club about discover nus arts on campus © 2026 national university of singapore, last updated 7 july 2026

title: Funding | NUS Cultural Activities Club (CAC)
content: this website is under development. check in again on 1 august 2026. nus cac home venue funding publicity resources student groups equipment loaning about nus cac home venue funding publicity resources student groups equipment loaning about funds & grants the heartbeat of student creativity. general finance resources nus cac can decide what to add here, any links to link. nus cac can decide what to add here, any links to link. nus cac can decide what to add here, any links to link. nus cac can decide what to add here, any links to link. downloadable infographic to be inserted. nussu council funding this funding scheme is geared towards students’ interests in spearheading their own initiatives, and in doing so, it encourages a spirit of community vibrancy and dynamism. apply now usparks grant the u-sparks funding grant aims to a promote sporting lifestyle, arts appreciation and cultural understanding among the nus community and external communities. apply now nus performing and visual arts scholarship (mid-term) the nus performing & visual arts scholarship is awarded to highly-talented individuals who possess outstanding academic, performing and/or visual arts participation and representation records. apply now cac creator grant our experienced architects provide personalized design solutions that turn your dreams into reality. apply now nussu space credits funding this funding scheme bolsters nus student groups organizing student-led activities and enhance student life on campus. this initiative is designed ito alleviate the operational expenses of student groups and encourage the optimal use of nus facilities. apply now apply now national arts council (nac) funding the nac provides a sustainable funding infrastructure through grants and arts housing support for the arts community to achieve a vision of singapore as home to diverse and distinctive arts that inspire our people, connect our communities and position singapore globally. nussu adobe creative cloud licensing scheme the nus students' union (nussu) offers a limited monthly adobe creative cloud licensing scheme to all general undergraduates, allowing access to desktop applications like photoshop, illustrator, and premiere pro. apply now apply for grants reach us info.nuscac@gmail.com where we are nus students' cultural activities club yusof ishak house 31 lower kent ridge road nus cultural activities club about discover nus arts on campus © 2026 national university of singapore, last updated 7 july 2026

title: About | NUS Cultural Activities Club (CAC)
content: this website is under development. check in again on 1 august 2026. nus cac home venue funding publicity resources student groups equipment loaning about nus cac home venue funding publicity resources student groups equipment loaning about about our team we are a bunch of friends connected by love for fps games. it all started in benjamin's basement, the only safe spot while skipping classes. they looked down upon our gaming habits, but hey, look at us now.  benjamin evans i guess gaming in your mothers basement can bring joy into your life? this and the fact that i have a better aim than tanya. jeremy crow weird mods for games? bring it on! i love the creativity of the gaming community, but sometimes it gives me nightmares. tanya cooper i have been trying to imitate a male voice for 6 years to prevent my inbox from flooding with messages from boys. also - i have a better aim than ben.  “ only the dead have seen the end of war. ” email address submit subscribe to our newsletter reach us info.nuscac@gmail.com where we are nus students' cultural activities club yusof ishak house 31 lower kent ridge road nus cultural activities club about discover nus arts on campus © 2026 national university of singapore, last updated 7 july 2026
